nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive skill guide for producing commercial-grade Windows installers from Python applications using Nuitka compilation and Inno Setup, with bilingual (English/Chinese) content covering build optimization, DLL analysis, and a 323 MB PySide2 reference case.
nodes.languageNotes: Bilingual content (English + Simplified Chinese) covering production-grade packaging with Nuitka; a rarity among ECC skills and indicates a specific operator audience.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Exhaustive git workflow reference skill covering branching strategies (GitHub Flow, trunk-based, GitFlow), conventional commit formatting, merge vs. rebase trade-offs, PR lifecycle, conflict resolution, semantic versioning, git hooks, and anti-patterns.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for managing GitHub repository operations including issue triage, PR review, stale policy enforcement, CI/CD operations, release management, and security monitoring via the gh CLI.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Idiomatic Go development patterns skill covering core principles (simplicity, zero value, accept interfaces/return structs), error handling, concurrency patterns (worker pools, context, errgroup), interface design, package organization, struct design (functional options), and performance best practices.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Go testing patterns skill covering TDD red-green-refactor cycle, table-driven tests, subtests, helper utilities, golden files, interface-based mocking, benchmarks, fuzz testing (Go 1.18+), coverage targets, HTTP handler testing, and CI/CD integration.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for operating on Google Workspace assets (Docs, Sheets, Drive) with a structured find-inspect-edit-clean workflow emphasizing precision edits and avoiding data loss.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Clinical Decision Support System (CDSS) patterns skill covering drug interaction checking, dose validation, NEWS2 clinical scoring, alert severity UI behavior, and zero-tolerance testing requirements to prevent false negatives in patient-safety-critical code.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Electronic Medical Record (EMR) development patterns skill covering patient safety-first design, single-page encounter flow, smart template systems, medication safety patterns, locked encounter records, and accessible clinical UI patterns.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Healthcare evaluation harness skill for patient safety verification, defining eval categories, pass/fail matrices for CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM gates, and CI/CD integration patterns to catch regressions before deployment.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Healthcare PHI/PII compliance patterns skill covering data classification, row-level security access control, audit trail design, common data-leak vectors, database schema tagging, and pre-deployment compliance checklists.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for safely importing external task and job data into the Hermes system, defining sanitization rules, conversion patterns, and output contract requirements for launch handoffs and quiet-hours operator jobs.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Hexagonal (ports-and-adapters) architecture skill covering core concepts, a six-step workflow for modeling boundaries and adapters, a TypeScript example with composition root, multi-language mapping, anti-patterns, migration playbook, and testing guidance per architectural boundary.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: HIPAA compliance skill providing guardrails for product decisions and vendor/tooling choices involving protected health information, with examples and cross-references to related healthcare skills.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Pre-flight readiness checklist skill for homelab network upgrades, covering safety rules, hardware inventory, VLAN and trust-zone planning, DNS filtering readiness, remote access readiness, and a sequenced change protocol to prevent lockouts.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Homelab network setup skill covering IP planning, DHCP/DNS configuration, cabling and Wi-Fi recommendations, with beginner and VLAN-ready example scenarios.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Pi-hole DNS installation and configuration skill for homelabs, covering Docker and bare-metal deployment, blocklist management, DNS-over-HTTPS upstream configuration, local DNS records, and network-wide ad/tracker blocking setup.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: VLAN segmentation skill for homelabs providing design templates, firewall rules, and step-by-step configuration for UniFi, pfSense/OPNsense, and MikroTik hardware to isolate network trust zones.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: WireGuard VPN skill for homelab remote access covering Linux server setup, client configuration, split/full tunnel trade-offs, key generation, peer management, pfSense/OPNsense integration, and DDNS for dynamic home IPs.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill documenting the Hookify rule file format and event system, covering frontmatter fields, multi-condition advanced format, bash/file/stop/prompt event types, regex pattern tips, and file organization for the ECC hook rule engine.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for reading and inheriting the code style of existing legacy codebases, with auto-detect mode selecting between full first-scan and incremental sniff branches, then enforcing the extracted style per turn.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Intent-driven development skill guiding the agent through goal/risk establishment, context discovery, scope definition, acceptance criteria writing, and structured handoff, with depth levels from quick capture to full acceptance brief and pass/fail rubric.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Domain skill for inventory demand planning covering forecasting methods, forecast accuracy metrics, safety stock calculation, reorder logic, promotional planning, ABC/XYZ classification, decision frameworks, and escalation protocols for supply chain scenarios.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for creating investor-facing materials including pitch decks, one-pagers, financial models, and accelerator applications, with a golden rule emphasizing founder voice fidelity over polish and quality gate criteria.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for crafting personalized investor outreach including cold emails, warm intro requests, follow-up cadences, and post-meeting updates, with strict voice-preservation rules and a quality gate checklist.

nodes.name: generate_icons.swift
nodes.summary: Swift CLI script that generates 1x/2x/3x PNG icon assets from SF Symbols for iOS/macOS Xcode asset catalogs, writing Contents.json alongside each imageset and accepting symbol name, size, color, weight, and output directory as CLI arguments.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses macOS-only AppKit (NSImage, NSBitmapImageRep) — not cross-platform; must be run on a Mac with Swift installed. Demonstrates NSImage's symbol configuration API introduced in macOS 11.

nodes.name: parseColor
nodes.summary: Parses a hex color string (with or without leading #) into an NSColor, falling back to system gray on invalid input.

nodes.name: parseWeight
nodes.summary: Maps a font weight name string (e.g. 'semibold') to its NSFont.Weight enum value, defaulting to thin.

nodes.name: generateIcon
nodes.summary: Core icon generation function that renders an SF Symbol at 1x/2x/3x scale into tinted PNG files within a named .imageset directory and writes the Xcode Contents.json manifest.

nodes.name: requireOptionValue
nodes.summary: CLI argument helper that validates a flag's next positional value is present and not another flag, exiting with an error message on failure.
